evidence.excerpt: task_run_ledger id 359673 shows eval-domain-daily/eval:a2a RUN_DELIVERED once at 2026-07-23T02:59:59.884Z; the day-over-day scheduler gap from 2026-07-18 through 2026-07-21 did not repeat between 2026-07-22 and 2026-07-23.
dynamic_task_defs has zero id/template_id='harness-fit-digest' rows, and task_run_ledger has zero harness-fit-digest runs.
The active runtime is node dist/index.js PID 2344, started 2026-07-21 15:03:13 local time with elapsed 1 day 19 hours at inspection; PR #134 merged later at 2026-07-22T03:12:33Z.

The runtime checkout HEAD remains d5961fe3 while fetched origin/main is 3ab53aaf; git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/main reports 6 commits behind, including PR #134 and the 2026-07-22 eval:a2a verdict PR #133.

PR #134 merged at 3f3a8e5ad0da4c51983f43baca3fad7ccd6e0850 and restored the F167 path B sourceRefs prewrite plus grounding samples confidence fix; PR #135 subsequently advanced origin/main to 3ab53aaf.

origin/main contains packages/api/src/infrastructure/harness-eval/cron-predefine.ts, cron-telemetry-source.ts, and snapshot-writer.ts; local HEAD contains only f167-eval.ts and f167-eval-counter-window.ts in that file set.
origin/main f167-eval.ts contains const hasSamples = groundingSamples.length > 0 and the samples-only confidence branch; local HEAD still returns confidence: hasCounters ? 'medium' : 'no-data'.
The 2026-07-23 scheduled callback payload included no sourceRefs, and docs/harness-feedback contained no 2026-07-23 f167-a2a snapshot/attribution raw YAML before this diagnostic sourceRefs write.
Because the runtime did not load the PR #134 prewrite path, today's callback again has no counter_window/counterWindow block or grounding-phase-o sample distribution.

The grounding-phase-o confidence fix exists on origin/main but not in the active runtime checkout/dist, so sample-store evidence cannot surface as low confidence until the runtime is pulled, rebuilt, and restarted.

proposedAction.rationale: Remote main now contains the recovered F167 code. The remaining acceptance blocker is loading that code into the runtime process before the next 03:00 UTC eval.

proposedAction.target: F167 Phase O eval:a2a sourceRefs prewrite
proposedAction.rationale: After restart, trigger or wait for the next eval:a2a callback and verify sourceRefs.snapshotName/sourceRefs.attributionName plus counter_window.duration_hours before declaring closure.
PR #134 recovered the second systemic sync-clobber, but the prevention work remains unowned; without a guard, the same mainline clobber can recur.
